_doc: Stage 10 output contract for extraction to identity gating. Validated against runSourceIdentityEvaluationPhase() and evaluateSourceIdentity()/applyIdentityGateToCandidates() on 2026-03-17.

output_contract.anchorCheck: Merged anchor conflict object with major/minor conflict arrays.
output_contract.identity: Per-source identity score, confidence, decision, reasons, and critical conflicts.
output_contract.identityGatedCandidates: Field candidates annotated with identity_label and identity_confidence.
output_contract.anchorStatus: Derived summary string used in telemetry and downstream filtering.
output_contract.manufacturerBrandMismatch: Boolean sentinel for manufacturer pages that still conflict on brand identity.
output_contract.parserHealth: Source extraction health object computed from candidates, anchors, and endpoint signals.

downstream_usage: Stage 11 filters usable sources to identity_label in {matched, possible}.
Major anchor conflicts exclude the source from consensus even when identity looks good.
Parser health rows are aggregated into stage 12 metrics.
